APPMANAGEMENTPOLICIES: Checks that app management policies are in place and applied.
CONDITIONALACCESSBASELINE: Checks that core Conditional Access protections are in place.
CONDITIONALACCESSWHATIF: Lets you preview how Conditional Access changes would affect sign-ins.
EIDSCA.GENERATED: Checks that core Entra security settings remain aligned to the baseline.
ENTRARECOMMENDATIONS: Checks for recommended Entra security improvements that still need attention.
MTCIS365PUBLICGROUP: Checks that group settings and membership are controlled safely.
MTCISAASSIGNMENTNOTIFICATION: Checks that assignment changes trigger the expected notifications.
MTCISADIAGNOSTICSETTINGS: Checks that diagnostic logging and monitoring are enabled.
MTCISENSUREGUESTACCESSRESTRICTED: Checks that guest access is limited to approved scenarios.
MTCISENSUREGUESTUSERDYNAMICGROUP: Checks that guest access is limited to approved scenarios.
MTCISENSUREUSERCONSENTTOAPPSDISALLOWED: Checks that users cannot approve risky app access on their own.
MTCISPASSWORDEXPIRY: Checks that password expiration follows the approved policy.
MTCISSPODEFAULTSHARINGLINK: Checks that new SharePoint sharing links start with the safest default.
MTCISSPODEFAULTSHARINGLINKPERMISSION: Checks that default SharePoint sharing link permissions are limited appropriately.
MTCISSPOGUESTACCESSEXPIRY: Checks that guest access to SharePoint expires after the intended period.
MTCISSPOGUESTCANNOTSHAREUNOWNEDITEM: Checks that guests cannot reshare content they do not own.
MTCISSPOPREVENTDOWNLOADMALICIOUSFILE: Checks that risky file downloads are blocked in SharePoint.
MTCISTHIRDPARTYANDCUSTOMAPPS: Checks that third-party and custom apps are allowed only where approved.
MTCISTHIRDPARTYSTORAGESERVICESRESTRICTED: Checks that third-party storage services are restricted.
MTCISUSEROWNEDAPPSRESTRICTED: Checks that user-created apps are limited to approved uses.
INSPECTEDISCOVERYADMINS: Checks that eDiscovery administrator access is restricted to approved users.
INSPECTOFFICEMESSAGEENCRYPTION: Checks that Office Message Encryption is configured where needed.
MTENTITLEMENTMANAGEMENTINACTIVEPOLICIES: Checks that entitlement management inactive policies is configured as expected.
MTENTITLEMENTMANAGEMENTORPHANEDRESOURCES: Checks that entitlement management orphaned resources is configured as expected.
MTENTITLEMENTMANAGEMENTVALIDAPPROVERS: Checks that app access and consent are controlled appropriately.
MTENTITLEMENTMANAGEMENTVALIDRESOURCEROLE: Checks that entitlement management valid resource roles is configured as expected.
MTENTRAIDCONNECT: Checks that Entra settings remain aligned with the tenant baseline.
MTONPREMISESSYNCHRONIZATION: Checks that directory synchronization from on-premises systems is working as expected.
